'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 90''' was the nintieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 17]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Freedon Nadd|The Shadow of Freedon Nadd]]
*[[Ruwee Naberrie/Legends|Ruwee Naberrie]]
*[[Gavin Darklighter]]
*[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[Petranaki arena|Geonosis Arena]] beasts
*[[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]
*[[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] - [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]
*[[Wanderer Scout Surveyor|Surveyor Package]] and [[87-RM Scout Collector|Scout Collector]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and Couture]]
*[[Hapan Battle Dragon]]
